mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_schedule_adjust WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY original_date DESC
SELECT * FROM t_schedule_adjust WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY original_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_schedule_adjust ( adjust_id, schedule_id, class_id, adjust_type, original_date, original_time, adjusted_date, adjusted_time, original_teacher_id, substitute_teacher_id, substitute_reason, course_id, status, apply_by, approve_by, approve_time, approve_remark ) VALUES ( #{adjustId}, #{scheduleId}, #{classId}, #{adjustType}, #{originalDate}, #{originalTime}, #{adjustedDate}, #{adjustedTime}, #{originalTeacherId}, #{substituteTeacherId}, #{substituteReason}, #{courseId}, #{status}, #{applyBy}, #{approveBy}, #{approveTime}, #{approveRemark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_schedule_adjust SET adjusted_date = #{adjustedDate}, adjusted_time = #{adjustedTime}, substitute_teacher_id = #{substituteTeacherId}, substitute_reason = #{substituteReason}, status = #{status}, approve_by = #{approveBy}, approve_time = #{approveTime}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark} WHERE adjust_id = #{adjustId}
